options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $json.body.event_type,
  $json.body.entity_type || null,
  $json.body.entity_id || null,
  $json.body.predicted_value || null,
  $json.body.actual_value || null,
  $json.body.signal || null,
  $json.body.context ? JSON.stringify($json.body.context) : null,
  $json.body.source || 'manual'
] }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  event_type,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  AVG(predicted_value) as avg_predicted,
  AVG(actual_value) as avg_actual,
  AVG(actual_value - predicted_value) as avg_delta,
  MAX(logged_at) as last_event
FROM gda_feedback
WHERE logged_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
GROUP BY event_type
ORDER BY count DESC;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_feedback (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  event_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  entity_type VARCHAR(30),
  entity_id INTEGER,
  predicted_value NUMERIC,
  actual_value NUMERIC,
  signal TEXT,
  context JSONB,
  source VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'manual',
  logged_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_feedback_type ON gda_feedback(event_type);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_feedback_date ON gda_feedback(logged_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_feedback_entity ON gda_feedback(entity_type, entity_id);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_learned_weights (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  weight_key VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  weight_value NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  confidence NUMERIC DEFAULT 0,
  sample_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  last_computed TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  description TEXT
);

-- Seed default weights if not present
INSERT INTO gda_learned_weights (weight_key, weight_value, confidence, sample_count, description) VALUES
  ('pwin.customer_relationship', 0.25, 0, 0, 'Shipley weight: customer relationship'),
  ('pwin.technical_solution', 0.20, 0, 0, 'Shipley weight: technical solution fit'),
  ('pwin.past_performance', 0.20, 0, 0, 'Shipley weight: past performance'),
  ('pwin.price_competitiveness', 0.15, 0, 0, 'Shipley weight: price competitiveness'),
  ('pwin.team_composition', 0.10, 0, 0, 'Shipley weight: team composition'),
  ('pwin.contract_vehicle', 0.10, 0, 0, 'Shipley weight: contract vehicle'),
  ('briefing.army_relevance', 1.0, 0, 0, 'Topic boost: Army/C5ISR content'),
  ('briefing.iew_relevance', 1.0, 0, 0, 'Topic boost: IEW&S content'),
  ('briefing.intel_community', 1.0, 0, 0, 'Topic boost: Intel community content'),

SELECT 'gda_feedback and gda_learned_weights ready' AS status;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({error: 'Invalid action. Use: log, stats, setup'}) }}
